title: Crispy Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A delicious and flavorful Mexican dish, perfect for a quick dinner or lunch. Crispy chicken, crunchy tacos, and a side of fresh toppings make this meal a real treat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken breasts to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Heat 1/4 cup of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breasts to the skillet and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken breasts to a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by slicing the chicken breasts and placing them onto the tortillas.
Top with shredded cheese, salsa, and a squeeze of lime juice.
